summary: Iteration 7 testing complete. All requested bug fixes verified: 1) Student video call polling fix - GET /api/live-sessions/{session_id} returns room_url and status=active after teacher accepts (CRITICAL FIX VERIFIED). 2) Notification sound added using expo-av for native + AudioContext for web. 3) Profile '+' NEW button navigates to create-story (verified via clicking 'NEW' text). Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All flows working.

issues: Console warnings: expo-av deprecation (use expo-video), shadow* style deprecation (use boxShadow), pointerEvents deprecation - cosmetic warnings from dependencies, useNativeDriver warning - expected for web

action_items: MINOR: data-testid='add-story-highlight-btn' not rendering in web HTML - the attribute exists in code (profile.tsx:287) but doesn't appear in rendered HTML. Functionality works but testid selector fails. Consider investigating React Native Web data-testid handling.
critical_code_review_comments: POLLING FIX VERIFIED: request-lesson/[id].tsx lines 43-73 - Two separate useEffects now: countdown timer (depends on [status]) and polling (depends on [status, sessionId]). This fixes the bug where setWaitTime reset the counter variable to 0.

NOTIFICATION SOUND VERIFIED: LessonNotificationBanner.tsx lines 157-212 - playNotificationSound() implemented with Web (AudioContext 880Hz ring pattern) and Native (expo-av with base64 WAV beep). Also has vibration pattern.
PROFILE '+' BUTTON VERIFIED: profile.tsx lines 282-310 - TouchableOpacity with onPress={() => router.push('/(main)/create-story')} when highlight.isNew is true. Navigation works correctly.
VIDEO CALL PAGE VERIFIED: video-call/[id].tsx - Loads Daily.co room via WebView (native) or iframe (web)
BACKEND API VERIFIED: GET /api/live-sessions/{session_id} returns full session with room_url after teacher accepts
seed_data_creation: Created multiple live sessions for testing polling flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Key iteration 7 fixes verified: 1) Polling bug fix in request-lesson/[id].tsx - two separate useEffects for countdown and polling. 2) Notification sound in LessonNotificationBanner.tsx using expo-av + AudioContext. 3) Profile '+' NEW button works (but data-testid doesn't render in web). API flow: student requests -> teacher accepts -> student polls GET /api/live-sessions/{id} -> gets room_url -> navigates to video-call.
